name: Jack Little
description: British-born American composer, singer, pianist, actor, and songwriter
abstract: Jack Little (born John Leonard; May 30, 1899 – April 9, 1956), (another source gives his birth date as May 28, 1902) sometimes credited as Little Jack Little, was a British-born American composer, singer, pianist, actor, and songwriter whose songs were featured in several movies. He is not to be confused with the burlesque comedian also …

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: Yeah, he was with Little Jack Little's band in the earlier years.
